textByHashes.26e5de7bbf69b92dac606d21a3d8354c796b3e34: Ah, , you're finally here. Your task for this room is to defeat Sir Leye. He has been blessed by Saradomin to be undefeatable by any blade, so it should be quite a challenge for you.
textByHashes.cad65ec725c9aedd72494ad36b6891db599100fe: If you are having problems, remember; A true warrior uses his wits as much as his brawn. Fight smarter, not harder.
textByHashes.a6913347b02b30ec4f4f39c58123991fbf943459: Excellent work, . Please step through the portal to meet your next challenge.
textByHashes.536ffe086fafa2b4939d8065774f00272973a953: Well done, that was your fourth test, you only have one more to go.
textByHashes.56cd4f9040c67f802d3b9b3f6102774f9b968ff6: Please step through the portal to your final test... ...and good luck, .
textByHashes.75e582667633ee079b95322a7165237815761d8c: Excellent work! You have passed all five of the required tests! Please accept my congratulations!
